variants: Helena Kavanagh, an innovator in organ technology, is currently employed at Riverloom Organs. Originally from Solstice Gate, she now makes her home in Sandpiper Run. Her exceptional contributions to the field have been recognized with the awarding of the Shellborn Plaque. Among her notable achievements is the Glyphwave Convergence Engine, which has significantly advanced organ systems. Helena's career exemplifies her commitment to enhancing the capabilities of modern technology.
